summary: First-time end-to-end testing of Boulay Beach Resort (BBR) client portal MVP. Backend: 20/20 pytest cases pass. Frontend: all critical flows verified (landing, language FR/EN toggle, register, full 5-step booking tunnel with Pass Day 2A+1C = 125000 FCFA, FINEO payment -> confirmed + QR data URL, account page with bookings list, QR modal, cancel booking, event privatization, staff login API for admin/manager/reception).
critical_code_review_comments: Mongo _id is correctly excluded everywhere (projection {"_id": 0} on all reads, doc.pop('_id', None) after insert_one). Verified.

FINEO payment is a placeholder as specified in the requirements - POST /api/bookings/{id}/pay just flips status to confirmed and generates QR. This is INTENTIONAL per user instructions and clearly marked as mocked.
Backend seeds staff accounts idempotently on startup via find_one+insert_one pattern. Good.
JWT_SECRET defaults to a hardcoded string if not set in env - acceptable for dev, but recommend mandatory env var for production deployment.
Booking capacity check is not transactional (race condition possible under concurrent load), but acceptable for MVP.
Password stored via bcrypt correctly; verify_password catches exceptions. Good.
test_credentials: Staff seeded: admin@boulay.ci/Admin@2026, manager@boulay.ci/Manager@2026, reception@boulay.ci/Reception@2026. Client used a dynamic test email like jean.test.<suffix>@example.ci / Test@2026.
seed_data_creation: Test created several clients (jean.test.<suffix>@example.ci), bookings (pending/confirmed/cancelled on sunset+pass_day with future dates) and event requests (events.<suffix>@example.ci). No production data was modified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/test_bbr_api.py covers offers, auth (client + 3 staff accounts), availability, full booking lifecycle (create/pay/get/cancel), capacity enforcement, past-date rejection, and event privatization. Frontend testids to use: landing-page, hero-cta, language-toggle, offer-card-{id}, reg-name/surname/phone/email/password, reg-submit-btn, login-email-input, login-password-input, login-submit-btn, booking-tunnel, booking-step-1..5, booking-calendar, counter-adults/children-inc/dec/value, step-next-btn, step-back-btn, special-requests-input, confirm-summary-btn, pay-fineo-btn, qr-code-img, view-bookings-btn, client-account, booking-card-{bid}, qr-btn-{bid}, cancel-btn-{bid}, pay-btn-{bid}, qr-modal, qr-modal-img, qr-close-btn, events-page, ev-name/surname/phone/email/type/date/count/message, ev-submit, event-success. Phase 1 scope: staff dashboards (manager/admin/receptionist) are NOT implemented on frontend - only API login works. Do not test those UIs.
